message:
feat(fcp-streaming): expand SSE, WebSocket, and reconnection handling

Real-time streaming infrastructure improvements:

error.rs (+97 lines):
- Streaming error taxonomy: connection, protocol, timeout, backpressure
- Error recovery hints: retryable classification, suggested delays
- Cross-transport error mapping: WebSocket close codes to unified errors
- Error aggregation: multi-error collection for batch failure reporting

reconnect.rs (+80 lines):
- Exponential backoff with jitter: configurable base, max, multiplier
- Connection state machine: connecting, connected, reconnecting, failed
- Session resumption: last event ID tracking, gap detection
- Health probing: ping/pong timing, stale connection detection
- Max retry limits: per-session and total lifetime budgets

sse.rs (+149 lines):
- Server-Sent Events parsing: event, data, id, retry field extraction
- Multi-line data assembly: newline handling, UTF-8 validation
- Comment filtering: heartbeat comments, debug annotations
- Event dispatch: typed event handlers, catch-all fallback
- Retry hint processing: server-suggested reconnection timing

stream.rs (+110 lines):
- Unified stream abstraction: SSE and WebSocket behind common trait
- Backpressure handling: buffer limits, slow consumer detection
- Stream multiplexing: multiple logical channels over single connection
- Metrics collection: message counts, byte throughput, latency histograms

websocket.rs (+131 lines):
- WebSocket frame handling: text, binary, ping, pong, close
- Subprotocol negotiation: priority ordering, fallback selection
- Extension support: per-message deflate, custom extensions
- Close handshake: graceful shutdown, timeout enforcement
- Message fragmentation: large message chunking, reassembly

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
